question_text: How often do you consume bread?
What is your favorite type of bread?
Do you prefer to buy bread from a grocery store, bakery, or make it at home?
What is your favorite way to eat bread (e.g., toast, sandwich, with soup)?
Are you allergic to any ingredients commonly found in bread, such as wheat or gluten?
Have you ever baked bread at home?
How important is the nutritional value of bread to you when making a purchase?
Are you interested in trying new or exotic types of bread?
Do you have any dietary restrictions that affect your bread consumption?
Would you consider bread to be a staple food in your diet?
